location: Software Engineer based in Seoul, South Korea
hiring: If you are hiring, reach out via email!

lines: I ship fast, prove with live links, and measure by what changed — not what was built.
I'm drawn to the friction people tolerate daily — and I build to remove it.

questOn.problem: Grading open-ended reasoning is slow and inconsistent.

printer.problem: Students used printers without proper logging, and staff lacked real-time visibility & issue tracking.

youreview.problem: Personal rankings for films/music/books are scattered across notes and screenshots—hard to share and revisit.

awards.name: KTVF (Korea Technology Venture Foundation) — Selected as Top 12 Finalist for '2026 Startup Level Up Project'
KoreaIT Academy — Web Service Development Competition 1st Place
SNAAC (Seoul National University Accelerator) — Advanced to Final Round (Pre–Demo Day)
Startup Express (Korea University) — Advanced to Final Round (Pre–Demo Day)

bullets: Spearheaded the technical delivery of a full-stack AI assessment SaaS, securing 2 confirmed academic pilot clients and launching a production-ready MVP within 3 months.

Architected a 4-stage LLM orchestration engine to evaluate complex reasoning in real-time; transitioned the system from a GPT-based demo to a scalable production infrastructure leveraging LangChain and AWS.

Successfully executed live AI-powered exams for academic institutions, maintaining zero-downtime operations and reducing grading workload by ~80% (10 hrs → 2 hrs) through automated rubric-based scoring.
Selected as Top 12 Finalist for '2026 Startup Level Up Project' by KTVF (Korea Technology Venture Foundation).
